description: Execute V0.8-M5: Validate custom YAML workflow authoring capabilities and formalize the Team Mode Git Dual-Tiered Synchronization protocol in the documentation.
scope: 1. Create an example custom workflow at templates/workflows/custom-deploy-pipeline.yaml containing mixed deterministic (bash) and execution (ai_execution) nodes. 2. Update documentation/EN/TEAM_COLLABORATION.md and documentation/ZH/TEAM_COLLABORATION.md (or create a dedicated CUSTOM_WORKFLOWS.md/SYNC_PROTOCOL.md) detailing the exact Git branch strategy (agent-sync vs main) and the pull-model claiming mechanism for remote teams.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of realtime WebSocket/Database sync engines (we rely on Git). NO execution of the legacy Python tooling deprecation warnings (M6). NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics outside of standard M5 progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to build non-Git synchronization backends.
Executing without an approved M5 contract.
